Enjoy a well-connected and vibrant community that meets all your needs!

resultList.dtldesc: Discover the epitome of luxurious living with this captivating 3 BHK Villa for sale in Icon Sanctuary, Sarjapur, Bangalore. Embracing Vaastu compliance and graced by a west-facing orientation, this exceptional villa stands as a corner property, offering a unique and prestigious living experience.::::::Property Specifications ::::::Boast a generous super built-up area of 1750 sqft across the ground, first floor, and a covered terrace. Wardrobes in all bedrooms, including a walk-in closet in the master bedroom, offer ample storage space.::::::The modular kitchen, complete with a chimney, and a utility area attached to it, ensure a seamless culinary experience.
